requirements.description: Canonical operating cash-flow definitions (NOI = Credits BUYER_RECEIPT - Debits SUPPLIER_PAYMENT + SALARY; Debt Service = DEBT_SERVICE; no average credits as NOI; no inferred obligations as credits/DSCR)
requirements.notes: PARTIAL: Centralized canonical cash flow calculation (NOI = Credits BUYER + POS + INVESTOR + OTHERS - Debits SUPPLIER + SALARY + RENT + UTILITY + TAX + OTHERS) in app/domain/financial/engine.py. Does not infer obligations as 0.20*debits. Remaining work: E2E Frontend integration verification across all case flows.

requirements.description: Correct current DSCR calculation across trailing periods without approximation or fabricated fallback ratios
requirements.notes: PARTIAL: Implemented current and proposed DSCR across trailing periods with canonical numerator and verified debt service denominators. Remaining work: Full E2E validation against multi-period stress scenarios.

requirements.description: Correct post-loan DSCR calculation incorporating proposed facility EMI into debt service
requirements.notes: Fully implemented in SafeLimitEngine.calculate_emi_from_loan and calculate_post_loan_dscr, returned directly in DecisionPolicy.evaluate() and DecisionPackageResponse.

requirements.description: Reducing-balance amortization exact formula for EMI and debt service projections
requirements.notes: Fully implemented exact formula P * r * (1+r)^n / ((1+r)^n - 1) in SafeLimitEngine and called across policy and limit engines.

requirements.description: Explicit unknown-state semantics (UNKNOWN / INSUFFICIENT_DATA when missing reporting periods or zero debt service instead of fabricated numbers)
requirements.notes: PARTIAL: Explicit unknown-state semantics (UNKNOWN_OBLIGATIONS, INSUFFICIENT_DATA) implemented in FinancialCapacityEngine and DecisionPolicy. Remaining work: Frontend UI warning badge integration for UNKNOWN states.

requirements.description: Product-specific structure selection for Working Capital Line, Receivables Finance, and Term Loan with exact policy constraints
requirements.notes: PARTIAL: Product-specific structure selection for WORKING_CAPITAL_LINE, INVOICE_DISCOUNTING, TERM_LOAN, EQUIPMENT_FINANCE implemented with strict limit multipliers and tenor checks. Remaining work: E2E UI verification.

requirements.description: Evidence-linked calculation lineage mapping calculated limits directly to underlying evidence IDs
requirements.notes: PARTIAL: Evidence-linked calculation lineage and ID mapping (calculation_evidence_ids) added to DecisionPackageResponse and engine calculations. Remaining work: Frontend click-through audit trail verification.

requirements.description: Evidence Sufficiency Passport (dedicated institutional model evaluating freshness, depth, rail coverage, and decisionability)
requirements.notes: Fully implemented in app/domain/evidence/passport.py and exposed via /api/cases/{case_id}/evidence-passport and embedded in decision-package.

requirements.description: Freshness and depth assessment (evaluating trailing month continuity across GST, Account Aggregator, EPFO, and CIBIL)
requirements.notes: PARTIAL: Exact exponential decay freshness (100 * exp(-lambda * age_days)) with source-specific decay rates implemented in EvidencePassportEngine. Remaining work: Real-time UI refresh testing.

requirements.description: Contradiction and reconciliation handling (GST declared revenue vs Account Aggregator bank inflows contradiction severity grading)
requirements.notes: PARTIAL: Formal severity grading between GST declared revenue and bank inflows (INFO, WARNING, CRITICAL) implemented in EvidencePassportEngine. Remaining work: UI contradiction alert banner verification.

requirements.description: Consent scope and expiry enforcement (strict block when consent is expired, revoked, or insufficient scope)
requirements.notes: Policy checks `consent_status != 'VALID'` and blocks processing (`BLOCK_PROCESSING`). Will verify integration with passport.

requirements.description: Obligation verification state (asserting CIBIL obligations versus observed DEBT_SERVICE bank debits)
requirements.notes: PARTIAL: Obligation verification check in EvidencePassportEngine explicitly asserts CIBIL obligations versus observed DEBT_SERVICE bank debits without inferring from GST. Remaining work: E2E bureau mock testing.

requirements.description: Backend-computed single-factor stress tests (Revenue drop -15%, Interest rate hike +200bps, COGS increase +10%)
requirements.notes: PARTIAL: Backend-computed single-factor stress tests (Revenue drop -15%, -25%; Interest +200bps, +400bps; Margin drop -5%) centralized in app/domain/stress/engine.py. Remaining work: Interactive UI stress slider integration.

requirements.description: Backend-computed combined downside stress test (simultaneous revenue drop and interest/cost increase)
requirements.notes: PARTIAL: Backend-computed combined downside stress test (simultaneous revenue drop -20% and interest rate spike +300bps) implemented in stress engine. Remaining work: UI combined stress dashboard verification.

requirements.description: Stress decision-transition explanation (explaining exactly why a case transitions from CONDITIONAL_OFFER to DECLINE under stress)
requirements.notes: PARTIAL: Stress decision-transition explanation (identifying exact parameter threshold causing transition from APPROVE/READY_FOR_REVIEW to CONDITIONAL_OFFER/DECLINE) implemented in stress engine. Remaining work: UI transition explanation card verification.

requirements.description: Deterministic 30/60/90-day Bankability Path (concrete milestones for declined/conditional MSMEs based on exact gaps)

requirements.description: Same-engine simulated intervention impact (recalculating supportable amount and DSCR when 30/60/90-day actions are completed)
